data.title: Scilex Explores Strategic Options, Analyst Initiates On Blockbuster Potential For Sciatica Pain Candidate
data.description: Alliance Global Partners has initiated coverage on Scilex Holding Company. The company explores strategic options for its subsidiary, Scilex Pharma, including potential spinoffs and dividend distributions, while anticipating significant sales from its pain treatment candidate, SEMDEXA.

data.title: First Community Q3 Earnings and Revenues Beat Estimates
data.description: First Community (NASDAQ: FCCO) came out with quarterly earnings of $0.50 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.45 per share. This compares to earnings of $0.23 per share a year ago. These figures are adjusted for non-recurring items.

data.title: $1000 Invested In This Stock 5 Years Ago Would Be Worth $2,300 Today
If You Invested $100 In This Stock 10 Years Ago, You Would Have $800 Today
